haiku:
Flour clouds softly rise,
Golden biscuits crown the table,
Butter dreams melt slow.
Happy #NationalButtermilkBiscuitDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Feathers flutter bright,
Laughter spills like grain at noon,
Joyful hops abound.
Happy #DanceLikeAChickenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Stars twinkle like dreams,
Galaxies of delight,
Joyous tales take flight.
#HappyBirthdayGeorgeLucas from @ClamBakeSanta

Oven's warmth invites,
Chips melt like laughter shared,
Batches joyfully rise.
Happy #NationalChocolateChipDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Colorful blooms intertwine,
Hearts gather like stars.
Happy #InternationalDayOfFamilies from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages dance with dreams,
Munchkin laughter fills the air,
Emerald fields shine.
#HappyBirthdayLFrankBaum from @ClamBakeSanta

Sizzling on the grill,
Savory smoke fills the air,
Laughter dances near.
Happy #NationalBarbecueDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Tiny swimmers dance,
In saltwater’s warm embrace,
Joyful leaps and splashes.
Happy #SeaMonkeyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Glistening sequins,
Laughter dances on soft notes,
Cake like sweet sunshine.
#HappyBirthdayLiberace from @ClamBakeSanta

Crimson fruit cascades,
Golden crust enfolds delight,
Sweet warmth fills the air.
Happy #NationalCherryCobblerDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm oven’s embrace,
Golden crusts and sweet aromas,
Joy kneads through our hands.
Happy #WorldBakingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker bright,
Laughter dances through the night,
Joy like confetti.
#HappyBirthdayAyaanHirsiAli from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden cheese aglow,
Puffing high with joy and warmth,
Savory delight.
Happy #NationalCheeseSouffleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Plates stack high with cheer,
Sunshine spills on clean table,
Laughter fills the room.
Happy #NoDirtyDishesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker gold,
Joyful voices sing aloud,
Time to celebrate!
#HappyBirthdayBertrandRussell from @ClamBakeSanta

Velvet layers stack,
Frosting swirls like moonlit cream,
Sweet joy in each bite.
Happy #NationalDevilSFoodCakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Frogs leap with great joy,
Splashing through the sunlit pond,
Nature sings with glee.
Happy #FrogJumpingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright candles aglow,
Joyful songs of love rise high,
Moments bloom like spring.
#HappyBirthdayMalcolmX from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden crust we share,
Creamy dreams and cheese unite,
Joyful bites delight.
Happy #NationalQuicheLorraineDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Paws patter with joy,
Eyes shine like morning sunlight,
Hearts unite as one.
Happy #RescueDogDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden pages turn,
Ink flows like a river's song,
Words bloom, bright and free.
#HappyBirthdayHonordeBalzac from @ClamBakeSanta
